title: Safety Last!

evidence.note: Published 1923; the 95-year US copyright term has expired for works published through 1930, so the film print is public domain in the US by term expiry.

watch.label: Internet Archive — Safety Last! (1923), full film

editorial: Safety Last! is a 1923 American silent comedy directed by Fred C. Newmeyer and Sam Taylor, produced by Hal Roach and starring Harold Lloyd, whose image dangling from a clock face high above the street is among the most reproduced in silent cinema. Distributed by Pathé Exchange. Published in 1923, the film print's US copyright term has expired, placing the photoplay in the public domain by term expiry. Later restorations may carry their own separate rights.
